Very small brand (~$360K annual GMV), lean team that relied heavily on Talia to build funnels -- inexperienced with platform

messages.text: Hey FOND team! I'm Pulkit, your new GM here at FERMÀT. I've been with the FERMÀT team for about 1.5 years and I'm genuinely so excited to start working with you all! Would love to hop on a call and get to know everyone. Feel free to grab some time on my calendar.

messages.text: Hey FOND team! I'm reaching out with some bittersweet but exciting news -- later this week I'll be transitioning into a new role on our Enterprise team here at FERMÀT. I'm thrilled to introduce Pulkit.
